title: 10 best herbal essential oils for dry nose
description: Calendula officinalis, also known as pot marigold, essential oils helps with dry nose because of its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It soothes and calms the nasal passages, reducing redness and swelling associated with dryness. The oil's antioxidant properties also help to protect the delicate skin and mucous membranes in the nose from damage, promoting healing and hydration.
